2605.17314.title: Weak-to-Strong Elicitation via Mismatched Wrong Drafts
2605.17314.paper_summary: We consider whether off-policy experience from a smaller, weaker model can elicit capability in a stronger learner that on-policy RL fine-tuning (e.g., GRPO) does not reach. We find that injecting mathematically wrong drafts from a smaller but more domain-trained model -- mismatched to the current problem -- into a stronger learner's GRPO context consistently outperforms standard on-policy GRPO on held-out MATH-500 and out-of-distribution AIME 2025/2026. Concretely, we use Mathstral-7B as the learner, Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B as the draft model, 8.8K Level 3--5 MATH problems (with MATH-500 held out), and train with Dr. GRPO. Mismatch is an active ingredient: shuffling drafts to mismatched problems while holding everything else constant yields $+1.62$pp on MATH-500 (greedy pass@1) over the matched-wrong variant ($n=10$ seeds, $p=0.0015$, Welch's $t$). In fact, the mismatched-wrong variant leads all other variants we tested on MATH-500 across both greedy pass@1 and sampling pass@$k$. On out-of-distribution AIME 2025 and 2026, the mismatched-wrong variant uniquely lifts pass@$k$ above both Mathstral-7B (in its native [INST] format) and the Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B draft model at every sample budget from $k=1$ to $k=1024$ across 2 seeds ($+14.2$pp on 2025 and $+9.0$pp on 2026 at pass@1024 over Mathstral-7B), and at pass@1024 also leads no-draft, matched-wrong, and mismatched-correct variants on both years. All variants use the same prompt with no draft injection at test time. The recipe -- trained on a single GPU with no SFT, no reward models, no synthesized data, and no produce-critique-revise inner loop -- reaches 71.98% MATH-500 on Mathstral-7B-v0.1, the highest published result on this model to our knowledge, surpassing the heavier WizardMath pipeline at 70.9% on full MATH (SFT + PPO with process/instruction reward models).
2605.17314.paper_summary_zh: 我們考慮從一個較小、較弱的模型中獲取的離政策經驗是否能夠在一個較強的學習者中引發能力，而這種能力是通過在政策強化學習微調（例如，GRPO）中無法達到的。我們發現，將來自一個較小但更具領域訓練的模型的數學錯誤草稿——與當前問題不匹配——注入到較強學習者的GRPO上下文中，始終優於在保留的MATH-500和分佈外的AIME 2025/2026上標準的在政策GRPO。具體而言，我們使用Mathstral-7B作為學習者，Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B作為草稿模型，8.8K級別3-5的MATH問題（保留MATH-500），並使用Dr. GRPO進行訓練。不匹配是一個活躍的成分：在保持其他條件不變的情況下，將草稿隨機調整到不匹配的問題上，能在MATH-500上獲得$+1.62$pp的提升（貪婪通過@1）相對於匹配錯誤變體（$n=10$種子，$p=0.0015$，Welch的$t$）。事實上，這個不匹配錯誤變體在MATH-500上超越了我們測試的所有其他變體，無論是在貪婪通過@1還是取樣通過@$k$。在分佈外的AIME 2025和2026中，不匹配錯誤變體在每個樣本預算從$k=1$到$k=1024$的情況下，獨特地將通過@$k$提升到超過Mathstral-7B（以其原生[INST]格式）和Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B草稿模型的水平（在2025年獲得$+14.2$pp，在2026年獲得$+9.0$pp，通過@1024相對於Mathstral-7B），並且在通過@1024時也超越了無草稿、匹配錯誤和不匹配正確變體的表現。在測試時，所有變體都使用相同的提示，且不進行草稿注入。這個配方——在單個GPU上訓練，沒有SFT，沒有獎勵模型，沒有合成數據，沒有生成-批評-修訂的內部循環——在Mathstral-7B-v0.1上達到了71.98%的MATH-500，據我們所知，這是該模型上發表的最高結果，超越了在完整MATH上70.9%的更重的WizardMath管道（SFT + PPO與過程/指令獎勵模型）。
2605.17314.author: Wei Deng et.al.
